this activity diagram models a menu navigation process at the bottom of a page.
the process starts at the home action.
there is a decision point to access the menu at the bottom of the page.
if the access is confirmed (si), it leads to the monitoring section.
if the access is denied (no), it leads to the notes section, which then returns to the home.
the diagram includes a clear flow for both yes and no paths, ensuring a structured navigation experience.
